results.title: ‘He gives his all, 24 hours a day, to help the national team’: Portugal head coach on Ronaldo
results.description: Ronaldo, 41, is set to feature in a record sixth FIFA World Cup as he continues his quest to win the only major international trophy missing from his illustrious career.

results.title: Red Bull Malaysia Announces Red Bull Next Generation To Discover And Support The Next Generation Of Athletes
results.description: Red Bull Malaysia announces Red Bull Next Generation, a new athlete development platform focused on emerging talent across Southeast AsiaApplications open for Malaysian athletes aged 18–25 across all sports and disciplinesSelected athletes will receive support including mentorship, workshops, media visibility...

results.title: Serena returns: Williams makes a winning comeback in doubles at Queen”s Club with Mboko
results.description: Serena Williams made a winning return to professional tennis at Queen’s Club, partnering with Victoria Mboko in doubles. The 44-year-old, a 23-time Grand Slam champion, impressed in her first match since 2022, but remains undecided about playing at Wimbledon

results.title: 📅 Pumas learn their route in pursuit of the A2026 title
results.description: The Pumas have suffered a lot in recent weeks. Losing in the final and seeing the strategist who turned things around for them leave the club has not been easy for the fans. With the schedule for the new tournament now set, it is time for the university side to turn the page and try to stay near the top of the table. Pumas know their path and will look to win the championship—can they do it? This article was translated into English by Artificial Intelligence. You can read the original version in 🇪🇸 here.
